title: Awakening
overview: Ah Jie is an average high school boy who happens to be a very talented cook. One day, a hungry and cute goddess appears in his kitchen, and changes his life forever.

title: Flower
overview: Soon after contracting with Ah Jie, Dora gets kidnapped by a plant, and a mysterious girl shows up at school.

title: Miaowu
overview: Animals escape from the zoo and rampage throughout the city. Hana confronts the Summoner but it is not what it seems...

title: The Last Supper
overview: Ah Jie is invited to dinner at Hana's residence and meets her grandfather, who reveals more information about Summoners.

title: Destroyer
overview: A furious battle rages at the Black Rose Castle. Will Harlan be victorious?

title: Transform! Roll Out!
overview: The pursuit of Destroyers leads Ah Jie to an abandoned village and a mysterious field of flowers.

title: Flower-Seeking Journey
overview: The pursuit of Destroyers leads Ah Jie to an abandoned village and a mysterious field of flowers.

title: Flowers from Abroad
overview: Moduo reveals his past, and the other Destroyers realize that he is in trouble.

title: Demon Furnace
overview: The Destroyers ambush Ah Jie and his friends, and battle ensues.

title: Furnace Island
overview: A merchant shows Ah Jie and his friends around Furnace Island.

title: Endless Trials
overview: Contestants participate in numerous trials in the Demon Furnace. Will Ah Jie make it through?

title: Sacrifice
overview: Battle rages on in the Demon Furnace as contestants fight to progress.
